name: Coverage: Event actions menu Edit Delete Ask AI
description: Create an event, open event actions (overflow/context), verify Edit, Delete, and Ask AI actions are available.

planSteps.description: Type demo@timeora.app into the email field
Type TimeoraDemo123! into the password field
Click Sign in and wait for the dashboard
Click + Add Event, title it TS Actions Menu, and Save
Wait 4 seconds for the event to appear
Click or right-click TS Actions Menu, or open its overflow / more-actions control
Verify action menu or dialog offers Edit and Delete, and preferably Ask AI / Tanya AI
If Ask AI is available, click it and wait 2 seconds
If Ask AI was clicked, verify the AI chat opens or receives event context; otherwise skip if only Edit/Delete were verified
Cleanup: delete TS Actions Menu if it still exists
